treatment_journey.name: prednisone
treatment_journey.evidence: Started on prednisone... Tapered off prednisone

treatment_journey.name: mesalamine
treatment_journey.evidence: Started on prednisone and mesalamine... tried to maintain on mesalamine alone. Lasted six months before major flare.

treatment_journey.name: methotrexate
treatment_journey.evidence: Started methotrexate. The weekly injections became my Friday night ritual. Worked okay for a while.

treatment_journey.name: Remicade
treatment_journey.evidence: Started Remicade after surgery. Game-changer initially... But after 18 months, developed antibodies.

treatment_journey.name: Humira
treatment_journey.evidence: Switched to Humira. The every-two-week injection is manageable.

pathway_endpoint.reasoning: Switched to Humira. The every-two-week injection is manageable.

referral_pathway.evidence: Health center said stress, normal for new students.

referral_pathway.name: family doctor
referral_pathway.evidence: Finally went home and saw family doctor.
